title: Findris

{{Quote|Shenvehr hints at Imperial fleet movements, troop deployments and other tactical information provided by a friend working in Imperial sector command on Findris.|A datafile by General Airen Cracken detailing Rebel Alliance operatives|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Findris''' was a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] celestial body that was the site of a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Sector Command (Galactic Empire)/Legends|sector command]] and the offices of [[Colonial News Nets]]. The anti-Imperial [[Justice Action Network]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] organization was formed on Findris in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. Shortly following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Colonial News Nets employee [[Pertaal Shenvehr]], while working on Findris, distributed information on the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents via the use of coded messages in a Colonial News Nets [[Ask Argothil Anything|advice column]].

==Description==
Findris was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Findris system/Legends|Findris system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Haldeen sector/Legends|Haldeen sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
{{Quote|<nowiki />''[Earnst]'' Kamiel was one of the founding members of the Justice Action Network, a terrorist group of radicals formed to destroy the Imperial infrastructure. The group was born on Findris 16 years ago ''[…]''<nowiki />|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN">{{JournalCite|8|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
[[File:PertaalShenvehrCNNoffices-CRO.png|thumb|300px|Pertaal Shenvehr worked at the Colonial News Nets offices on Findris.]]
Findris was home to several underground groups resisting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], of which the [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] organization known as the [[Justice Action Network]], which was founded on the celestial body<ref name="GNN" /> in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="Dates">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} and {{JournalCite|8|Galaxywide NewsNets}} are respectively set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|dates]] "36:5:23" and "36:10:5," both of which correspond to [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. The feature in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]] establishes that the [[Justice Action Network]] was founded sixteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior, so it must have been formed in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]].</ref> was the most violent one.<ref name="GNN" /> News reports issued by [[Colonial News Nets]] on the<ref name="GNN" /><ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]<ref name="Dates" /> [[Great ReSynchronization|dates]] 36:5:23 and 36:10:5 both mentioned Findris while providing background for the Justice Action Network.<ref name="GNN" /><ref name="GNN6" />

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] that shortly followed the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pertaal Shenvehr]] worked as an assistant features editor at the Colonial News Nets offices. [[Pertaal Shenvehr's friend|His friend]], who was employed at Findris's Imperial [[Sector Command (Galactic Empire)/Legends|sector command]], passed tactical information concerning the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Empire's military forces]] to Shenvehr, who in turn disseminated it to agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the form of coded messages embedded in the Colonial News Nets' advice column "[[Ask Argothil Anything]]." Around that time, Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] noted Findris as the current location of Shenvehr in a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Locations==
{{Quote|Shenvehr can almost always be found behind his desk at the Colonial News Net ''[sic]'' offices on Findris.|A datafile by General Airen Cracken detailing Rebel Alliance operatives|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Findris hosted a Galactic Empire [[Sector/Legends|sector]] command as well as the offices of the Colonial News Nets publication.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Findris was created by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Findris [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Findris itself, in grid square M-9.<ref name="TEA" />
